hero.headline: When your starter quits, we *rebuild* it right
hero.subheadline: Same-day fixes on starters, alternators, and electrical systems. Fort Myers shops trust us with their toughest jobs.

services_section.label: THE ELECTRIC WORK
services_section.heading: Starters, alternators, and everything that sparks
services_section.subheading: We fix what's broken instead of selling you new parts

services.title: Starter Rebuilds
services.description: Complete teardown and rebuild of starter motors. We restore original equipment to better-than-new condition, even on classic cars from the 1950s.

services.title: Alternator Repair
services.description: Full alternator diagnostics and repair service. We'll test your charging system for free and only fix what actually needs fixing.

services.title: Electrical Diagnostics
services.description: Track down mysterious electrical problems in any vehicle. Our testing equipment finds the real issue, not just the symptoms.

services.title: Classic Car Electric
services.description: Specialized work on vintage and classic vehicle electrical systems. We understand the unique challenges of older automotive wiring.

about.heading: Kyle knows electric systems inside and out
about.body: Kyle's Auto Electric Service has built a reputation across Fort Myers for honest diagnostics and quality rebuilds. We specialize in starter and alternator work that other shops send out or replace unnecessarily. From daily drivers to classic restorations, we fix it right the first time.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Fort Myers drivers are saying

reviews.name: Natalie D.
reviews.text: Kyle rebuilt my 1951 Ford F1 starter perfectly. Incredibly knowledgeable and fast - wouldn't trust anyone else with this kind of work.

reviews.name: Alan R.
reviews.text: Excellent repair work and customer service. Didn't even charge me for testing my alternator. I recommend him to everyone.

reviews.name: Peppy L.
reviews.text: Rock solid service with impeccable knowledge. Highly recommend Kyle for any electrical work.

reviews.name: Larry Z.
reviews.text: Super service from a really nice guy. I send all my customers' starters and alternators to Kyle.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: Covering Southwest Florida
service_areas.subheading: Serving these communities and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's actually broken?
cta.body: Bring your starter or alternator problems to someone who rebuilds instead of replaces. Call Kyle for honest diagnostics.
